title: cercis canadensis var. chinensis
intro: Cercis canadensis var. chinensis, also known as the Chinese Redbud, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China and parts of Asia, belonging to the legume family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Cercis canadensis var. chinensis include reducing fever, improving digestion, and relieving respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being dried and used in capsules or tinctures.
